name: LG_UPDATECLCARDRISKNUMS_002_01
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE LG_UPDATECLCARDRISKNUMS_002_01
       @CLREF      INT,
       @TRCODE     SMALLINT,
       @NETTOTAL   FLOAT,
       @COEF       SMALLINT,
       @REPORTRATE FLOAT,
       @BILLED     SMALLINT,
       @STATUS     SMALLINT,
       @STATUSDESP SMALLINT,
       @NETTOTALREP FLOAT  AS
DECLARE @RISKTYPE    SMALLINT
DECLARE @DESPRISKINC FLOAT
DECLARE @DESPRISKINCREP FLOAT
DECLARE @USEREP      SMALLINT
DECLARE @CHK         SMALLINT
DECLARE @EPSILON     FLOAT
SELECT @EPSILON = 0.0000001
SELECT  @CHK  = 0
IF  EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_NTLCK_002  WHERE (LOCKSTR = '002-' +
LTRIM(CAST(CAST('01' AS INTEGER) AS VARCHAR)) +'-SERV-1' ))
  BEGIN
       SELECT @CHK = 1
  END
IF (@CHK<>1 ) AND (@CLREF <> 0) AND EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_002_01_CLRNUMS WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)) AND (@STATUS=0) AND (@STATUSDESP=0)
 BEGIN
          SELECT @RISKTYPE = RISKTYPE, @USEREP = USEREPRISK
         FROM LG_002_01_CLRNUMS
         WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
         IF (((@TRCODE >= 1) AND (@TRCODE <= 5)) OR (@TRCODE = 26) OR ((@TRCODE >= 30) AND (@TRCODE <= 34)))
         BEGIN SELECT @DESPRISKINC = -1 * @COEF * @NETTOTAL
                 IF @REPORTRATE <> 0
                   SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = @DESPRISKINC/@REPORTRATE
                 ELSE SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = -1 * @COEF * @NETTOTALREP
           END
         ELSE IF (((@TRCODE >= 6) AND (@TRCODE <= 10)) OR ((@TRCODE >= 35) AND (@TRCODE <= 39)))
               BEGIN SELECT @DESPRISKINC = @COEF * @NETTOTAL
                       IF @REPORTRATE <> 0
                         SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = @DESPRISKINC/@REPORTRATE
                       ELSE SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = @COEF * @NETTOTALREP
                 END
          IF (@BILLED = 1)
          BEGIN SELECT @DESPRISKINC = 0
                 SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = 0
           END
         UPDATE LG_002_01_CLRNUMS
     SET DESPRISKTOTAL = DESPRISKTOTAL + @DESPRISKINC
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
          UPDATE LG_002_01_CLRNUMS
     SET DESPRISKTOTAL = 0
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF) AND ABS(DESPRISKTOTAL) < @EPSILON
         IF (@REPORTRATE <> 0) OR (@NETTOTALREP <> 0)
           UPDATE LG_002_01_CLRNUMS
           SET REPDESPRISKTOTAL = REPDESPRISKTOTAL + @DESPRISKINCREP
           WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
          UPDATE LG_002_01_CLRNUMS
     SET REPDESPRISKTOTAL = 0
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF) AND ABS(REPDESPRISKTOTAL) < @EPSILON
 END
IF (@CHK<>1 ) AND (@CLREF <> 0) AND EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_002_01_CLRNUMS WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)) AND (@STATUS=4) AND (@STATUSDESP=0)
 BEGIN
         SELECT @RISKTYPE = RISKTYPE, @USEREP = USEREPRISK
         FROM LG_002_01_CLRNUMS
         WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
         IF (@TRCODE = 1)
         BEGIN SELECT @DESPRISKINC = -1 * @COEF * @NETTOTAL
                 IF @REPORTRATE <> 0
                    SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = @DESPRISKINC/@REPORTRATE
                 ELSE SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = -1 * @COEF * @NETTOTALREP
           END
         ELSE IF (@TRCODE = 2)
               BEGIN SELECT @DESPRISKINC = @COEF * @NETTOTAL
                     IF @REPORTRATE <> 0
                       SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = @DESPRISKINC/@REPORTRATE
                     ELSE  SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = @COEF * @NETTOTALREP
                END
          IF (@BILLED = 1)
          BEGIN SELECT @DESPRISKINC = 0
                 SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = 0
           END
         UPDATE LG_002_01_CLRNUMS
     SET ORDRISKTOTAL = ORDRISKTOTAL + @DESPRISKINC
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
          UPDATE LG_002_01_CLRNUMS
     SET ORDRISKTOTAL = 0
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF) AND ABS(ORDRISKTOTAL) < @EPSILON
         IF (@REPORTRATE <> 0) OR (@NETTOTALREP <> 0)
           UPDATE LG_002_01_CLRNUMS
           SET REPORDRISKTOTAL = REPORDRISKTOTAL + @DESPRISKINCREP
           WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
          UPDATE LG_002_01_CLRNUMS
     SET REPORDRISKTOTAL = 0
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF) AND ABS(REPORDRISKTOTAL) < @EPSILON
END
IF (@CHK<>1 ) AND (@CLREF <> 0) AND EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_002_01_CLRNUMS WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)) AND (@STATUS=1) AND (@STATUSDESP=0)
 BEGIN
         SELECT @RISKTYPE = RISKTYPE, @USEREP = USEREPRISK
         FROM LG_002_01_CLRNUMS
         WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
         IF (@TRCODE = 1)
         BEGIN SELECT @DESPRISKINC = -1 * @COEF * @NETTOTAL
                 IF @REPORTRATE <> 0
                    SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = @DESPRISKINC/@REPORTRATE
                 ELSE SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = -1 * @COEF * @NETTOTALREP
           END
         ELSE IF (@TRCODE = 2)
               BEGIN SELECT @DESPRISKINC = @COEF * @NETTOTAL
                      IF @REPORTRATE <> 0
                        SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = @DESPRISKINC/@REPORTRATE
                      ELSE SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = @COEF * @NETTOTALREP
                END
          IF (@BILLED = 1)
          BEGIN SELECT @DESPRISKINC = 0
                 SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = 0
           END
         UPDATE LG_002_01_CLRNUMS
     SET ORDRISKTOTALSUGG = ORDRISKTOTALSUGG + @DESPRISKINC
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
          UPDATE LG_002_01_CLRNUMS
     SET ORDRISKTOTALSUGG = 0
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF) AND ABS(ORDRISKTOTALSUGG) < @EPSILON
         IF (@REPORTRATE <> 0) OR (@NETTOTALREP <> 0)
           UPDATE LG_002_01_CLRNUMS
           SET REPORDRISKTOTALSUGG = REPORDRISKTOTALSUGG + @DESPRISKINCREP
           WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
          UPDATE LG_002_01_CLRNUMS
     SET REPORDRISKTOTALSUGG = 0
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF) AND ABS(REPORDRISKTOTALSUGG) < @EPSILON
END
IF (@CHK<>1 ) AND (@CLREF <> 0) AND EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_002_01_CLRNUMS WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)) AND (@STATUS=0) AND (@STATUSDESP=1)
 BEGIN
         SELECT @RISKTYPE = RISKTYPE, @USEREP = USEREPRISK
         FROM LG_002_01_CLRNUMS
         WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
         IF (((@TRCODE >= 1) AND (@TRCODE <= 5)) OR (@TRCODE = 26) OR ((@TRCODE >= 30) AND (@TRCODE <= 34)))
           BEGIN SELECT @DESPRISKINC = -1 * @COEF * @NETTOTAL
                   IF @REPORTRATE <> 0
                      SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = @DESPRISKINC/@REPORTRATE
                   ELSE SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = -1 * @COEF * @NETTOTALREP
             END
          ELSE IF (((@TRCODE >= 6) AND (@TRCODE <= 10)) OR ((@TRCODE >= 35) AND (@TRCODE <= 39)))
                BEGIN SELECT @DESPRISKINC = @COEF * @NETTOTAL
                       IF @REPORTRATE <> 0
                        SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = @DESPRISKINC/@REPORTRATE
                       ELSE SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = @COEF * @NETTOTALREP
                 END
          IF (@BILLED = 1)
           BEGIN SELECT @DESPRISKINC = 0
                  SELECT @DESPRISKINCREP = 0
            END
         UPDATE LG_002_01_CLRNUMS
     SET DESPRISKTOTALSUG = DESPRISKTOTALSUG + @DESPRISKINC
      WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
          UPDATE LG_002_01_CLRNUMS
     SET DESPRISKTOTALSUG = 0
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF) AND ABS(DESPRISKTOTALSUG) < @EPSILON
         IF (@REPORTRATE <> 0) OR (@NETTOTALREP <> 0)
          UPDATE LG_002_01_CLRNUMS
          SET REPDESPRISKTOTALSUG = REPDESPRISKTOTALSUG + @DESPRISKINCREP
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
          UPDATE LG_002_01_CLRNUMS
     SET REPDESPRISKTOTALSUG = 0
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF) AND ABS(REPDESPRISKTOTALSUG) < @EPSILON
END
